function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request yet because the inbox note explicitly requires OCR on 5 files, but one listed file is missing. Please confirm the intended 5th path (or update the inbox note), and I will process all listed files exactly.
function.rulebook_notes: Explicit file lists in inbox items are authoritative and complete; do not substitute/add/remove files. Incomplete processing should return clarification rather than partial completion.
function.outcome_justification: The authoritative inbox instruction in 00_inbox/724_next-task.md lists 5 specific OCR targets. Four were readable; the 5th listed entry could not be read and is not present in the purchases directory, so completing only four would violate completeness requirements.
